description: Composition Olive green round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, and graphic print on the front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Flaunt your urban cool with this Levi's tee that has an uber cool print design on the front. This T-shirt is tailored to a beautiful finish, and is designed to offer a snug Fit that flaunts your chiseled body. Slip into a pair of richly hued jeans and sneakers, and throw on a tonal jacket to complement this trendy tee. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
